allow: Bash(cd D:/workspace/frp-studio && pnpm list 2>&1 | grep -i proxy)
Bash(cd D:/workspace/frp-studio && pnpm add https-proxy-agent 2>&1 | tail -5)
Bash(cd D:/workspace/frp-studio && pnpm add -D rcedit 2>&1 | tail -5)

Bash(cd D:/workspace/frp-studio && node -e "
const rcedit = require\('rcedit'\);
rcedit\('dist/win-unpacked/Frper.exe', { icon: 'resources/icon.ico' }\)
  .then\(\(\) => console.log\('rcedit OK'\)\)
  .catch\(e => console.error\('rcedit FAIL:', e.message\)\)
")
Bash(cd D:/workspace/frp-studio && node -e "const r = require\('rcedit'\); console.log\(typeof r, Object.keys\(r\)\)")
